title: Oberseminar: From Chips to Code: Programming, Profiling and Optimizing ML Systems
further_info: The Oberseminar will take place on Tuesday 4:00 to 6:00 p.m.; Besprechungsraum 5.OG, room 524. Please note that this is not the Seminar course. Credits for this course cannot be counted toward the master’s degree program; instead, upon successful completion, it will be listed in the transcript of records as an additional course.
